@startuml
actor "Administrative" as Administrative #97CAFF 
participant ":AddScooterUI\n<<interface>>\n{fontColor=white}" as AddScooterUI <<Interface>> {background-color:#0284C6}
participant ":Pharmacy\n<<class>>\n{fontColor=black; font-style:bold;font-size:15px;text-align:center;color:white;background:green}\n+addNewUser()\n-verifyPassword()" as Pharmacy <<Class>>  { background-color:red }
database scdb:ScooterDB#ffffff  
note right of scdb : This notes has icon \nas well 

== Initialization ==

Activate Administrative
Administrative ->> AddScooterUI : begins the process of adding a scooter
activate AddScooterUI
return asks for the necessary data(id_Scooter, qrCode, status, id_Battery, capacity)


Administrative->>AddScooterUI: inserts the solicited data
deactivate Administrative



group Create Scooter Object [alt]
    activate AddScooterUI
    
        note left on link
            The new object will be created if all parameters are correct!
        end note
        
    
        
         add participant IsListScooters
 
          Activate IsListScooters
      
      loop while list not empty
            
             group get List scooters[par]   
                AddScooterUI-->IsListScooters:newScooter(id_Scooter,qrCode,status,id_battery,capacity)\nis = getListScooters()
                
                 deactivate IsListScooters
                
                 
                  return validateBattery(bat)
                  
                   destroy bat
                    
                    else create Battery[id_batttery,bat_capacity]\nbatteries.add(new Batery())
                    
                     endif
                        
                        par save battery in DB
                            alt successfull saved to db
                                then error saving into database
                                    break exit from creation procedure
                                        Destroy IslistScooters
                                        
                                         elseif validation failed due incorrect input values
                                            opt show message about errors found during validation step(s).
                                                rect rgb(238,#fbbce);text color black;line thick dashed;border solid green;width auto;height minmax(min-content,max-content))do something here...endrectendifelsefailurereturnfalse;}finallycloseconnection();}}catch(SQLExceptionsqlex){Systemoutprintln("Errorwhilesavingbatterydata:"+sqliexgetMessage());}}}publicstaticvoidmain(String[]args)throwsException{//CreateanewinstanceofourapplicationandrunitnewApplication().init(args);}privatefinalLoggerlog=getLog(getClass());//InitializeSpringcontextwithconfigfileApplicationContextctx=newFileSystemXmlApplicatioContext("/WEB-INF/application-context.xml");//GetbeanfromspringcontainerbyitsnameorclasstypeObjectobj=(MyServiceBean)applicationContxt.getBean(MY_SERVICE_BEAN_NAME);//Callmethodonretrievedobject((IMyServic)e)obj.someMethod();//Closecontextsafelyafteruseif(context!=null&&contetx.isActive()){try{(Closer.closeQuietly(ctx));}cat ch(Exception e){//Handleexceptionappropriately(e.printStackTrace();)//Orjustignoreitasperyourrequirementssystems.exit(-ONE)//Exitprogramimmediatelywithoutdoinganythingmoreimportantthanthislineabove!!!Don'tforgetaboutresourcecleanupbeforequittingtoo!!!(Runtime.getRuntime()).removeShutdownHook(Thread.currentThread()));;}//Endoffinallyblockwhichensuresproperclosureevenwhenerrorsoccurduringexecutionflowcontrolstructuresliketry-catch-finnalyetc..}.'
